notes.introduction: An introductory topical message on 1 John 1:7 launching a year-long series through 1 John, organized around the theme 'Walking in the Light' as a description of the obedient Christian life. The passage is examined under four aspects: the relationship required, the obedience revealed, the progress indicated, and the fellowship produced.
themes: salvation as basis for christian living

sections.heading: Walking in the Light Requires Relationship
Walking in the Light Reveals Obedience
Walking in the Light Reveals Progress
Walking in the Light Results in Fellowship
